entries.name: Age
entries: Humans reach adulthood in their late teens and live less than a century.

entries.name: Size
entries: Humans vary widely in height and build, from barely 5 feet to well over 6 feet tall. Regardless of your position in that range, your size is Medium.

entries.name: Languages
entries: You can speak, read, and write Common and one extra language of your choice. Humans typically learn the languages of other peoples they deal with, including obscure dialects. They are fond of sprinkling their speech with words borrowed from other tongues: Orc curses, Elvish musical expressions, Dwarvish military phrases, and so on.

sizeEntry.name: Size:
entries: Medium (about 5-7 feet tall)

entries.name: Age Range
entries: You are 18 years old or older.

entries.name: Max HP
entries: You start with 10 Max HP.

entries.name: Proficiency Bonus
entries: You start with +1 Proficiency Bonus.

entries.name: Starting Items
entries: You start with a Smartphone, two sets of clothes, and your wallet with your ID and $50 USD.

entries.name: Homo Sapiens
entries: They are the naturally youngest sentient species in the universe,
yet they hold the key to life and death...
Why?

sizeEntry.name: Size:
entries: Medium (about 4-6 feet tall)

entries.name: Age Range
entries: As a high school freshman, you are 13-14 years old.

entries.name: Max HP
entries: You start with 6 Max HP.

entries.name: Proficiency Bonus
entries: You start with +0 Proficiency Bonus.

entries.name: Starting Items
entries: You start with a Smartphone, two sets of clothes, and your wallet with your ID and $20 USD.

entries.name: High School
entries: A fleeting, yet important event of life.
The first taste of independence.
The final occurrence of true youth.
You will have a lot of time on your hands.
